texto: It is very difficult to evolve by altering the deep fabric of life
autor: any change there is likely to be lethal. But fundamental change can be accomplished by the addition of new systems on top of old ones.
explicacao: Citação de any change there is likely to be lethal. But fundamental change can be accomplished by the addition of new systems on top of old ones. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It is very difficult to evolve by altering the deep fabric of life” articula reflexao, carl-sagan, difficult em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
